chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 275 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.791/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.792/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner will approach the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, where favourable order dated 12-08-2025 has already been passed in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. 3622 of 2025 filed by the Petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
